metadata.name: Bertsimas and Tsitsiklis (1997) — 2-Block LP
metadata.description: Example 6.2 from Bertsimas and Tsitsiklis Introduction to Linear Optimization (p.245-246), decomposed into 2 subproblems: Block 0 = {x1}, Block 1 = {x2, x3}. 1 equality coupling constraint. Minimise: -4x1 - x2 - 6x3 s.t. 3x1+2x2+4x3=17. Known optimal: x1=2, x2=1.5, x3=2, obj=-21.5.
